QUESTWORLDS.NoAbilities: No abilities. Click + to add one.
QUESTWORLDS.EmptyKeywords: No keywords yet. Create one to start building your character.
QUESTWORLDS.EmptyStandalones: No standalone abilities yet. Add one to get started.
QUESTWORLDS.EmptyConsequences: No consequences. You’re clean and healthy.
QUESTWORLDS.EmptyBreakouts: No breakouts yet — add one to this keyword.

Advancement.Heading: Advance
Advancement.Title: Advance an Ability
Advancement.ChooseKeyword: Choose a keyword for the breakout
Advancement.NoKeywords: No keywords available to attach a breakout to.
Advancement.EnterName: Enter a name for the new ability or keyword.

QUESTWORLDS.NextContestEffects.ClearPrompt: Are you sure you want to remove all temporary effects that expire after the next contest?

ContestDialog.Title: Contest
ContestDialog.SituationalModifierHelp: Use for temporary bonuses/penalties (e.g. cover, terrain, morale)
ContestDialog.WagerHelp: You can wager RP to multiply the result (higher risk/reward).

GroupContest.Title: Group Contest
GroupContest.NoTokens: Select one or more tokens to run a group contest.
GroupContest.NoActors: Selected tokens do not have linked actors.
GroupContest.NoAbilities: The primary actor has no abilities to roll.

ContestLauncher.Title: Quick Contest Launcher
ContestLauncher.NoToken: Select a token with a character actor to start a contest.
ContestLauncher.NoAbilities: The selected actor has no abilities to roll.

ContestResult.Title: Contest Result
ContestResult.AutoSuccessNote: This contest was resolved automatically due to auto-success.

Narration.MarginalVictory: The hero scrapes through with a win.
Narration.MarginalDefeat: The hero is pushed back this time.

Sequence.Success: The sequence is complete! You achieved your goal.
Sequence.Failure: The sequence ends in failure and the situation slips away.
Sequence.StrongSuccess: You claim a resounding victory. This feels like a strong outcome.
Sequence.WeakSuccess: You barely get there, but you succeed.
Sequence.WeakFailure: You falter and fail, but it isn’t total collapse.
Sequence.StrongFailure: You crash hard; the setback is significant.

Description.StrongSuccess: You gain a strong bonus for upcoming actions.
Description.WeakSuccess: You gain a small bonus for upcoming actions.
Description.WeakFailure: You suffer a light consequence from the setback.
Description.StrongFailure: You suffer a serious consequence from the setback.

Notifications.RequestSent: Request sent to the GM. They can approve and apply the effect.

SceneTracker.Title: Scene Tracker
SceneTracker.Help: Lists active consequences for all tokens on the current scene.
SceneTracker.NoConsequences: No active consequences are present on any tokens.
SceneTracker.GMOnly: Only the GM can view the scene tracker.
SceneTracker.ClearButton: Clear all consequences from this token
SceneTracker.ClearPrompt: Remove all consequences from this token? This cannot be undone.

AwardXp.NoToken: Select one or more tokens to award XP.

Macros.NotGM: Only the GM can create default macros.

DefaultResistance.Name: Default Resistance
DefaultResistance.Hint: The default resistance target number used when no token resistance is selected.

ShowResistanceLadder.Name: Show Resistance Ladder
ShowResistanceLadder.Hint: When enabled, the contest dialog includes a quick reference list of common resistance TNs.

EnableWageredSequences.Name: Enable Wagered Sequences
EnableWageredSequences.Hint: When disabled, the wager field is hidden and RP awards are not multiplied.

EnableStoryPoints.Name: Enable Story Points
EnableStoryPoints.Hint: When disabled, story point rerolls and upgrades are not available in contests.

NpcSheet.SelectHeroToken: Select a player token to roll against this NPC.
NpcSheet.HeroNoAbilities: The selected token has no abilities.
NpcSheet.SelectHeroAbility: Choose which ability the player should roll.
